case_title: ZUBOV BORIS VS WEST CHARLES IND AND DBA VIDEOLORE

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUN-19-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF MAY-09-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,304.00 FILED BY ZUBOV BORIS AS TO DEFENDANT WEST CHARLES  IND AND DBA VIDEOLORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-17-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04 TRIAL OF JUN-19-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEST CHARLES  IND AND DBA VIDEOLORE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZUBOV BORIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST CHARLES  IND AND DBA VIDEOLORE $2,609.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 INTEREST, $30.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,779.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WEST CHARLES  IND AND DBA VIDEOLORE HEARING SET FOR SEP-23-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-23-1991, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEST CHARLES  IND AND DBA VIDEOLORE DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE--PROPER VENUE IS IN ALAMEDA COUNTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
